name: Nystul's Magic Aura
description: You place an illusion on a creature or an object you touch so that divination spells reveal false information about it. The target can be a willing creature or an object that isn't being carried or worn by another creature. Choose one or both of the following effects. False Aura: you change the way the target appears to spells that detect magical auras, such as Detect Magic. Mask: you change the way the target appears to spells that detect creature types, such as a paladin's Divine Sense. If you cast the spell on the same target every day for 30 days, the illusion lasts until it is dispelled.
